rules: All id columns are bigint generated always as identity — resolve foreign keys via subqueries (email/name), never hardcode IDs
services column is text, not an array — display directly, never call .join()
Resend test mode (onboarding@resend.dev) only delivers to ADMIN_EMAIL (work.prashantkhuva@gmail.com)
Use ConfirmDialog component with loading prop for delete states
Checkbox component at app/admin/_components/Checkbox.jsx — custom button[role="checkbox"], not native input
Dark theme: bg #070707, card bg #0a0a0a, text rgba(255,255,255,0.85), accent #EAEFFF
Fonts: Inter (primary) via --font-inter, DM Sans (secondary) via --font-dm-sans
Tailwind CSS v4 — CSS-first config (no tailwind.config.js), @theme directive in src/index.css
Next.js App Router with app/ directory
ESLint v10 flat config — no Prettier
Animations: GSAP for scroll/hero, Framer Motion for UI interactions, Lenis for smooth scroll
Admin pages: all use PageContent.jsx pattern, server actions in app/admin/actions.js
WhatsApp sharing: wa.me links with encodeURIComponent + getSiteUrl() for preview URLs
PDF generation: via window.print() on preview routes at app/preview/{proposal,invoice}/[id]/route.js
